seo.title: VMC-850 CNC Milling Machine — 3-Axis Machining Center
seo.description: 3-axis CNC machining center assembled in Vietnam, running QS's Astro 10i controller. 850×500×540 mm travel, BT40 spindle at 12,000 rpm, ±0.005 mm positioning.

hero.heading: A CNC machining center built for Vietnamese workshops
hero.lede: Cast-iron frame, C3 ball screws, BT40 spindle — driven by the Astro 10i that QS designs and writes firmware for. One point of contact for the machine, electrics and software.
hero.imgAlt: QS VMC-850 CNC milling machine cutting a steel part under coolant
hero.diagramCaption: Live machining at the QS workshop

callouts.d: 12,000 rpm · 11 kW — mills steel, aluminium, copper.
Directional nozzle, 8-bar pump — keeps the tool cool on deep cuts.
Vise and T-slot clamps, quick changeover between batches.
Five 18 mm T-slots, 500 kg load capacity.

specs.heading: Technical specifications
specs.note: Standard configuration — spindle, tool magazine and travel can be tailored on request.

compare.heading: From raw stock to finished part
compare.body: Drag the handle to compare a blank before and after machining on the VMC-850. Illustrative preview — swap in your own parts.

configurator.heading: Build the machine around your shop
configurator.body: Pick a travel package, spindle and tool magazine — the spec panel updates live. Send the build for a QS engineer to quote.
configurator.note: Illustrative configuration for reference — final specs subject to engineering confirmation.
configurator.quoteIntro: Quote request for a CNC milling machine configured as:

video.heading: Watch it run
video.body: A machining cycle driven by a QS controller — filmed live at the workshop, no staging.
video.title: 5-axis machining center running the QS Astro 6AV controller

cta.heading: Need the machine configured for your parts?
cta.body: Send us a drawing or a sample workpiece — QS engineers propose the spindle, workholding and machining cycle within 48 hours.
